title: Build the shared command registry and args validator
action: Build command-registry.mjs: enumerate every subcommand of the 4 existing helpers (bee_status/cells/reservations/decisions.mjs) as {name, invoke, description, parameters, examples, deprecated:null, schema_version:'1.0'} (schema_version is a top-level manifest field, not per-entry - see must_haves), where parameters is JSON-Schema (type:object, properties, required) matching the exact shape Claude Code's own tool definitions use (per D3 - no bespoke shape). Build validate-args.mjs exporting a single validate(commandEntry, parsedArgs) function returning {ok:true} or {ok:false, error:{field, reason, command}} - this is the one validator both the future dispatcher (cell harness-integration-2) and bee-write-guard.mjs (cell harness-integration-3) will import; registry+validator ship first because both later cells depend on them (dependency ordering, not a citation of D2 - D2 governs Phase-1-before-Phase-2-6 sequencing, not intra-slice build order). Write test_bee_cli.mjs asserting: the registry is valid JSON-Schema for every entry, validate() rejects a missing required field with the structured shape above, AND every entry's examples[] execute successfully against the real underlying helper - but ONLY inside an isolated temp repo (mirror test_lib.mjs's existing os.tmpdir()-based isolation pattern from read_first; NEVER run an example against this checkout's live .bee/ state, since several examples are state-mutating cell/decision operations that would corrupt this repo's own tracking data if run for real here).

truths: command-registry.mjs exports an array covering every subcommand of the 4 existing helpers, plus a top-level schema_version field ('1.0')
validate-args.mjs's validate() returns {ok:false, error:{field,reason,command}} for a call missing a required parameter, never throws
every registry entry's examples[] runs successfully when executed inside an isolated temp repo (never against this checkout's real .bee/ state)

artifacts.substantive: exports the full registry, no TODO/stub entries
exports a working validate() function, no TODO stubs
runs and asserts registry + validator behavior, not a placeholder

key_links: test_bee_cli.mjs imports and exercises both command-registry.mjs and validate-args.mjs
prohibitions: No change to bee_status.mjs, bee_cells.mjs, bee_reservations.mjs, or bee_decisions.mjs in this cell - read-only reference for building the registry

trace.outcome: Built command-registry.mjs (21 subcommands across status/cells/reservations/decisions, D3 JSON-Schema parameters) + validate-args.mjs (validate()/isValidParameterSchema()) + test_bee_cli.mjs (32 checks: registry shape, validator behavior, every examples[] entry executed against the real underlying helper inside an isolated temp repo). Zero regression: test_lib.mjs 124/124 still passing.
